title: The relative importance and influence of stakeholders on business activities
summary: 9609 AS — stakeholder power, interest, and conflict over decisions.
learningObjectives: Evaluate how firms balance stakeholder demands.

simpleExplanation.title: Who pulls the strings?
simpleExplanation.summary: Stakeholders differ in how much they can affect or are affected by a business. Managers must weigh their competing interests.
steps: Employees want pay and job security.

sections.content: **Stakeholder influence** (1.5.2) extends **1.5.1**. Use a **power/interest matrix** mindset in case evaluation.
